examples.text: وَلَا تَجْعَلْ يَدَكَ مَغْلُولَةً إِلَىٰ عُنُقِكَ وَلَا تَبْسُطْهَا كُلَّ الْبَسْطِ فَتَقْعُدَ مَلُومًا مَّحْسُورًا
examples.english: Do not be so tight-fisted, for you will be blameworthy; nor so open-handed, for you will end up in poverty.

etymology.text: Derived from the passive participle of غَلَّ (ḡalla, “to fetter”).
